message:
fix(gui): resolve all compilation errors for frankenterm-gui binary (ft-1memj.3)

- Use full legacy mux-lua crate (with url-funcs dep) instead of minimal stubs
- Remove lua_stubs.rs (superseded by real mux-lua crate)
- Fix UserDataRef field access: pane.0 → (*pane).0 for Rust 2024 compatibility
- Fix explicit `ref` binding in keyevent.rs and draw.rs (Rust 2024 edition)
- Fix unsafe set_var for SSH_AUTH_SOCK (Rust 2024 edition)
- Fix include_bytes icon path for crates/frankenterm-gui depth
- Add wildcard arm in sessionhandler.rs for new floating pane PDU variants
- Clean up workspace Cargo.toml: remove non-existent crate paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3364,6 +3364,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "metrics",
  "mlua",
  "mux",
+ "mux-lua",

  "parking_lot",
@@ -3390,6 +3391,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "unicode-normalization",
  "unicode-segmentation",
  "url",
+ "url-funcs",
  "walkdir",
  "wezterm-client",
  "wezterm-font",
@@ -6578,6 +6580,28 @@ dependencies = [

 ]

 [[package]]
 name = "naga"
 version = "25.0.1"
@@ -10554,6 +10578,18 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "url-funcs"
+version = "0.1.0"
+dependencies = [
+ "anyhow",

+
 [[package]]
 name = "utf-8"
 version = "0.7.6"

@@ -26,9 +26,6 @@ anyhow.workspace = true
 frankenterm-core.workspace = true
 
 # Vendored FrankenTerm crates (ex-WezTerm)
-# NOTE: env-bootstrap and mux-lua are NOT included — they depend on the
-# full Lua API crate tree which is not vendored yet. Stubs are provided
-# in src/lua_stubs.rs and src/main.rs::frankenterm_bootstrap().
 codec.workspace = true
 config.workspace = true
 filedescriptor.workspace = true
@@ -44,12 +41,15 @@ tabout.workspace = true
 termwiz-funcs.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
 umask.workspace = true
+mux-lua.workspace = true
+url-funcs.workspace = true
 # Workspace aliases (wezterm-* -> frankenterm-* packages)
+# NOTE: frankenterm-dynamic is the canonical dep name. The extern crate alias
+# in main.rs provides `wezterm_dynamic` for vendored code that uses the old name.
+# Do NOT add wezterm-dynamic here — it would create a duplicate dep error.
 wezterm-bidi.workspace = true
 wezterm-blob-leases = { workspace = true, features = ["simple_tempdir"] }
 wezterm-client.workspace = true
-wezterm-dynamic.workspace = true
-# Also needed as frankenterm-dynamic for derive macro generated code
 frankenterm-dynamic.workspace = true
 wezterm-font.workspace = true
 wezterm-gui-subcommands.workspace = true

@@ -1,41 +0,0 @@
-//! Stub types that stand in for mux-lua and url-funcs Lua wrappers.
-//!
-//! The full mux-lua crate depends on the entire Lua API crate tree
-//! (battery, color-funcs, filesystem, logging, plugin, procinfo-funcs,
-//! serde-funcs, share-data, spawn-funcs, ssh-funcs, time-funcs, etc.).
-//!
-//! For the minimal GUI (ft-1memj.3), we only need the newtype wrappers
-//! that the termwindow and overlay code use to identify mux objects.
-//! Full Lua scripting is deferred to ft-1memj.8 (config) and beyond.
-
-use mux::domain::DomainId;
-use mux::pane::PaneId;
-use mux::tab::TabId;
-use mux::window::WindowId;
-
-/// Newtype wrapper around a mux PaneId.
-/// Replaces `mux_lua::MuxPane` without requiring Lua UserData impl.
-#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
-pub struct MuxPane(pub PaneId);
-
-/// Newtype wrapper around a mux DomainId.
-/// Replaces `mux_lua::MuxDomain`.
-#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
-pub struct MuxDomain(pub DomainId);
-
-/// Newtype wrapper around a mux TabId.
-/// Replaces `mux_lua::MuxTab`.
-#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
-pub struct MuxTab(pub TabId);
-
-/// Newtype wrapper around a mux WindowId.
-/// Replaces `mux_lua::MuxWindow`.
-#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
-pub struct MuxWindow(pub WindowId);
-
-/// Stub for `url_funcs::Url`.
-/// The real type wraps `url::Url` with Lua serialization support.
-#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
-pub struct Url {
-    pub url: url::Url,
-}

@@ -12,12 +12,14 @@ config.workspace = true
 libc.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 luahelper.workspace = true
+mlua.workspace = true
 mux.workspace = true
 parking_lot.workspace = true
 portable-pty.workspace = true
 smol.workspace = true
 termwiz-funcs.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
+url.workspace = true
 url-funcs.workspace = true
 wezterm-dynamic.workspace = true
 wezterm-term.workspace = true
